body.title: UnseenUniversity Phase 5 — cleanup (remove superseded TheIgors plumbing)
body.text:
# D-adc-phase-5-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity Phase 5 — cleanup (remove superseded TheIgors plumbing)
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-cc-mcp-server-deprecation, T-adc-network-discord-relocate

## Decision narrative

Phase 5 removes the old plumbing from TheIgors that is superseded by UnseenUniversity: cc_mcp_server.py (replaced by skeleton MCP aggregator) and wild_igor/igor/network/discord_bot.py (relocated into UnseenUniversity devices). Cleanup runs after Phase 1-4 are verified live.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
